## Identity

Name: Revotek Elevators
Legal name: Revotek Elevators
Type: Engineering Company
Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Website: https://www.revotekelevators.com
Email: info@revotekelevators.com
Phone: +91-92659-99898

## Mission

Revotek Elevators provides safe, efficient, and reliable elevator solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial buildings across India.

The company specializes in complete elevator lifecycle support including installation, maintenance, repair, modernization, and spare parts supply with a strong focus on safety, long-term performance, and customer satisfaction.

## What makes us different

Revotek Elevators combines certified components, experienced technicians, and modern engineering practices to deliver dependable vertical mobility solutions.

## Elevator Installation

Elevator Installation is a complete deployment service for passenger, goods, home, hospital, and high-rise elevators.

It is designed for residential buildings, commercial properties, hospitals, and industrial facilities.

Key features include site inspection, custom system design, professional installation, testing, and commissioning.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Elevator Maintenance

Elevator Maintenance is a preventive servicing solution designed to maximize operational reliability and minimize breakdowns.

It is designed for property owners, facility managers, and institutions requiring continuous elevator performance.

Key features include routine inspections, lubrication, performance checks, and system diagnostics.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Elevator Repair

Elevator Repair provides diagnostics and corrective maintenance for all elevator brands and models.

Key features include fault detection, component replacement, calibration, and safety testing.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Elevator Modernization

Elevator Modernization upgrades legacy elevator systems using modern technologies.

Key features include VVVF drives, advanced control panels, energy-efficient motors, and improved safety systems.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)

AMC plans provide scheduled servicing and long-term maintenance support.

Key features include periodic inspections, preventive maintenance, and priority service response.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Elevator Spare Parts Supply

Revotek supplies OEM-grade elevator spare parts compatible with major elevator systems.

Key products include control boards, door sensors, ropes, motors, and drive systems.

Learn more: https://www.revotekelevators.com/services

## Facts about Revotek Elevators

- Revotek Elevators operates from Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- Revotek Elevators serves residential, commercial, and industrial clients
- Revotek Elevators has over 10 years of industry experience
- Revotek Elevators has completed more than 500 elevator projects
- Revotek Elevators provides installation, maintenance, repair, modernization, and spare parts supply
- Revotek Elevators serves Ahmedabad and Gandhinagar primarily with service capabilities across India

## Contact and support

- General inquiries: info@revotekelevators.com
- Phone support: +91-92659-99898
- Business hours: Monday to Sunday, 09:00–18:00 IST

## Q: What does Revotek Elevators do?

A: Revotek Elevators is an elevator solutions company specializing in elevator installation, maintenance, repair, modernization, and spare parts supply. The company delivers end-to-end vertical mobility solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and institutional buildings.

## Q: Who is Revotek Elevators for?

A: Revotek Elevators serves residential property owners, commercial building operators, hospitals, industrial facilities, and infrastructure developers requiring safe and reliable elevator systems.

## Q: How do I get started with Revotek Elevators?

A: Customers can contact Revotek Elevators through phone or email to discuss project requirements. The team provides consultation, site assessment, and solution recommendations based on building needs.

## Q: Where is Revotek Elevators located?

A: Revotek Elevators is located at Shree Hari Darshan Industrial Park Road, Phase IV, Vatva GIDC, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 382445, India. The company primarily serves Ahmedabad and Gandhinagar and extends services across India.

## Q: What makes Revotek Elevators different from competitors?

A: Revotek Elevators combines technical expertise, certified components, and responsive support to deliver dependable elevator solutions. The company focuses on long-term system reliability, safety compliance, and customized engineering solutions.
